kshitij
Jake Stein
Nolan Vu

#### What's great

Fin handles the bread-and-butter support stuff really well, FAQ-type questions, order status, basic troubleshooting, without needing much hand-holding once the knowledge base is set up properly. The resolution rate we saw in the first month was better than expected, and the handoff to a human agent when Fin can't handle something felt smooth.

Where it gets tricky is when customers ask slightly off-script questions or need something that requires looking up account-specific details from an external system. The integration setup to make that work isn't super plug-and-play, and you'll need someone reasonably technical to configure it right.

Review Chatwoot? [...] 4.7

Based on 6 reviews

Review Chatwoot?

Chatwoot is praised for its open-source nature and effective customer relationship management. Users appreciate its Slack integration, email continuation, and customization options. It's seen as a cost-effective alternative to Zendesk and Intercom, with a user-friendly interface and mobile app. However, some users report connectivity issues. Makers from Sweego highlight its utility for maintaining customer contact and feedback collection. Overall, Chatwoot is valued for its simplicity, scalability, and affordability, making it a strong choice for startups.
